title: 1.1: Tests that buildAPIURL returns a correctly formatted URL when all parameters are provided
1.2: Tests that buildAPIURL returns nil error when all parameters are provided

1.8: Tests that buildAPIURL returns an empty URL when repoName is empty
2.1: Places the test for valid URL building in pkg/sources/huggingface/huggingface_client_test.go
2.2: Places the test for empty endpoint handling in pkg/sources/huggingface/huggingface_client_test.go

3.1: All tests use the Go testing package with *testing.T parameter
